title: desmodium strigillosum var. pendenticarpum
intro: Desmodium strigillosum var. pendenticarpum, also known as the hairy tick clover or hairy ticktrefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Desmodium strigillosum var. pendenticarpum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
